product_overview: LexFlowAI is an enterprise contract management system (React + TypeScript frontend, Supabase backend, Edge Functions) that centralizes contract lifecycle, automates document analysis with AI, and enforces strong security and audit controls.
core_goals: Provide a responsive React UI for users to manage contracts, vendors, franchises and units.
Automate PDF data extraction and AI-driven contract analysis to surface obligations, risks and alerts.
Integrate electronic signature providers and handle signature webhooks to complete contract signing workflows.
Support robust security: Supabase Auth with optional 2FA (TOTP), row-level security, audit logging and rate limiting.
Deliver notifications and collaboration: email, WhatsApp and organization invitations via Edge Functions.
Ensure compliance and data governance (GDPR/LGPD) and operational observability (audit logs, anomaly detection).

features.name: App UI
features.description: Frontend React application that loads the client SPA, provides routing, contexts (Auth, Organization) and renders the contract management interface.
user_flows: GET / -> Receive 200 with HTML string (load SPA) -> GET /api/config (client) -> Receive 200 with app configuration
GET / -> Receive 500 (server/build error) -> Client displays maintenance/error UI

features.name: Authentication & 2FA (TOTP)
features.description: User sign-in flow using Supabase Auth, optional TOTP 2FA verification via Edge Function, and session + organization context loading.
user_flows: POST /auth/signin with email+password -> Receive 200 with session token (access_token/refresh_token) -> GET /rest/v1/profiles?user_id=eq.{user_id} with token -> Receive 200 user profile -> GET /rest/v1/organizations?id=eq.{org_id} with token -> Receive 200 org data

POST /auth/signin with email+password (2FA enabled) -> Receive 200 with ephemeral auth requiring 2FA -> POST /functions/v1/totp-auth with token+totp_code -> Receive 200 verified and full session token -> GET /rest/v1/organization_members?user_id=eq.{user_id} with token -> Receive 200 membership
POST /auth/signin with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 unauthorized (error) -> Client shows invalid-credentials message

POST /auth/signin with valid credentials (2FA enabled) -> Receive ephemeral response -> POST /functions/v1/totp-auth with expired/invalid totp_code -> Receive 401 totp validation failed -> Client shows 2FA error

features.name: Contract Creation & Management
features.description: Create, update, retrieve and manage contract entities, templates, obligations, alerts and attachments via Supabase tables and edge processing functions.
user_flows: POST /rest/v1/contratos with JSON body (title, organization_id, parties, metadata) and token -> Receive 201 with contract id -> POST /functions/v1/processar-requisicao-contrato with contract_id -> Receive 200 processing accepted -> GET /rest/v1/contratos?id=eq.{contract_id} with token -> Receive 200 contract record
POST /rest/v1/contratos with missing required fields and token -> Receive 400 validation error -> Client displays field validation errors

PATCH /rest/v1/contratos?id=eq.{contract_id} with updated fields and token -> Receive 200 updated contract -> GET /rest/v1/contract_history?contract_id=eq.{contract_id} with token -> Receive 200 history entry
PATCH /rest/v1/contratos?id=eq.{contract_id} with token not authorized (RLS) -> Receive 403 forbidden -> Client shows permission denied

features.name: Document Upload, PDF Extraction & AI Analysis
features.description: Handle document uploads, extract structured data from PDFs, run AI contract analysis and persist analysis results for UI display.
user_flows: POST /storage/v1/object/upload with multipart/form-data (pdf file) and token -> Receive 200 with file_key -> POST /functions/v1/extrair-dados-pdf with file_key and token -> Receive 200 with extracted_data -> POST /functions/v1/analisar-contrato with contract_id and extracted_data -> Receive 200 with analysis_id -> GET /rest/v1/contract_analysis?contract_id=eq.{contract_id} with token -> Receive 200 analysis result
POST /storage/v1/object/upload with corrupted file and token -> Receive 422 unprocessable_entity -> Client displays upload/format error
POST /functions/v1/extrair-dados-pdf with file_key referencing missing file -> Receive 404 file not found -> Client shows extraction failure
POST /functions/v1/analisar-contrato with valid extracted_data but AI provider error -> Receive 502 bad gateway -> Function logs anomaly and returns transient error

features.name: Electronic Signature Integration & Webhooks
features.description: Integrate with DocuSign/Clicksign/D4Sign to send signature requests, and consume signature webhooks to update contract signature status.
user_flows: POST /functions/v1/processar-requisicao-contrato with contract_id and signature_request=true -> Receive 200 with external_signature_id -> External signature provider sends status update -> POST /functions/v1/signature-webhook with webhook payload and WEBHOOK_SECRET -> Receive 200 webhook accepted -> GET /rest/v1/contract_signatures?contract_id=eq.{contract_id} with token -> Receive 200 signature status updated
POST /functions/v1/processar-requisicao-contrato with contract_id but external provider returns error -> Receive 502 provider error -> Client shows signature send failure
POST /functions/v1/signature-webhook with missing/invalid WEBHOOK_SECRET -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> Webhook ignored and retry logged

features.name: Notifications & Organization Invitations
features.description: Send transactional emails, WhatsApp messages and organization invites via dedicated Edge Functions (Resend/WhatsApp integration).
user_flows: POST /functions/v1/enviar-notificacao-email with contract_event payload and RESEND_API_KEY -> Receive 202 accepted -> Notification queued and delivered (email) -> GET /rest/v1/audit_logs?event_type=eq.email_sent with token -> Receive 200 log entry

POST /functions/v1/enviar-notificacao-whatsapp with message payload and token -> Receive 202 accepted -> Provider returns delivery receipt via webhook -> POST /functions/v1/enviar-notificacao-whatsapp/webhook with receipt -> Receive 200 and update delivery status
POST /functions/v1/enviar-convite-organizacao with invitee_email and organization_id -> Receive 200 invite_sent -> Invite email delivered
POST /functions/v1/enviar-notificacao-email with invalid recipient address -> Receive 400 invalid_recipient -> Function returns error and client shows notification failure
POST /functions/v1/enviar-convite-organizacao with missing organization_id -> Receive 400 bad_request -> Client shows invite error

features.name: Security, Rate Limiting & Auditing
features.description: Enforce Row Level Security, per-role rate limiting, 2FA policies, audit logging and incident handling via Edge Functions and Supabase policies.
user_flows: POST /rest/v1/contratos with token belonging to role=analista_juridico and within rate limits -> Receive 201 created -> POST /rest/v1/audit_logs with action=create_contract and token -> Receive 201 audit log entry
POST /rest/v1/contratos with token exceeding allowed rate -> POST /functions/v1/rate-limiter with token -> Receive 429 too_many_requests -> Client shows rate limit message
POST /functions/v1/totp-auth with invalid totp -> Receive 401 totp failed -> Audit log created via POST /rest/v1/audit_logs with event=2fa_failed

POST /rest/v1/contratos with token where RLS denies access -> Receive 403 forbidden -> Client blocked and security-alert created via POST /functions/v1/security-alert-handler with event details -> Receive 200

features.name: Administration & Organization Management
features.description: Manage organizations, members, roles and permissions, invite users, configure environment secrets and deploy checks.
user_flows: POST /functions/v1/enviar-convite-organizacao with inviter_token and invitee_email -> Receive 200 invite_sent -> POST /rest/v1/organization_members with invitee_id, organization_id, role (after accept) -> Receive 201 membership created
PATCH /rest/v1/organization_members?id=eq.{member_id} with new role and admin token -> Receive 200 role updated -> GET /rest/v1/role_permissions?role=eq.{role} with token -> Receive 200 permissions
POST /functions/v1/enviar-convite-organizacao with invalid email domain -> Receive 400 invalid_invite -> Client shows validation error
PATCH /rest/v1/organization_members?id=eq.{member_id} with token lacking admin privileges -> Receive 403 forbidden -> Client shows permission denied

features.name: Monitoring, Automation & Compliance
features.description: Scheduled checks, automated alerts, anomaly detection and GDPR/LGPD request handling via Edge Functions and scheduled jobs.
user_flows: POST /functions/v1/verificar-alertas with CRON_SECRET -> Receive 200 alerts processed -> POST /functions/v1/enviar-notificacao-email for each alert -> Receive 202 queued
POST /functions/v1/anomaly-detector with telemetry payload -> Receive 200 anomalies list -> POST /functions/v1/security-metrics with metrics payload -> Receive 200 stored
POST /functions/v1/gdpr-handler with subject_request and token -> Receive 200 request_received -> GET /rest/v1/audit_logs?user_id=eq.{subject_id} with admin token -> Receive 200 logs for export
POST /functions/v1/gdpr-handler with malformed request body -> Receive 400 bad_request -> Client displays error
